tweets.text:
NEW: DHS reveals to @FoxNews some of the “worst of the worst” of the 5,000+ illegal aliens arrested by ICE & Border Patrol in the Los Angeles area since raids began in June, including numerous murderers, pedophiles, and rapists. LA Mayor Karen Bass says these raids must stop. Some of the rap sheets, starting from top left photo 👇🏻It’s worth reading who was roaming around in the sanctuary state of California. 

Diego Fernandez-Martinez (Mexico), a Surenos gang member w/ convictions for carjacking, robbery, & drug trafficking, 

Juan Carlos Marin-Hipolito (Mexico), previously convicted of murder & sentenced to 50 to life. 

Jaime Sarinana-Rodriguez (Mexico), a pedophile/registered sex offender convicted of continuously sexually abusing a child. 

Yohannes Zerai (Eritrea), convictions for assault to rape, sexual penetration with/ foreign object by force, robbery, battery w/ serious bodily injury, assault w/ a deadly weapon.

Justin Chung (South Korea), convicted of murder. 

Quoc Dung Pham (Vietnam), convicted of rape by force, sodomy, kidnapping, and oral copulation by force.

Bo Quoc Pham (Vietnam, brother of the above), convicted of rape by force. 

Hong Jing (China), convicted of sex trafficking of an individual and DUI. 

Martina Zacarias (Mexico), convicted of lewd acts with a child under 14 & a registered sex offender. 

Edgar Isaac Lopez (Mexico), convicted of voluntary manslaughter, child cruelty resulting in death, and assault by prisoner. 

Joel Benjamin Reyes (El Salvador), a registered sex offender convicted of 1st degree rape by force.

Omar Guzman-Rodriguez (Mexico), registered sex offender convicted of lewd acts with a child under 14.

author.description: Congressional correspondent for @foxnews in DC. 4x EMMY winner, 3x Edward R. Murrow winner, 4x RTNA Golden Mike winner. @Cronkite_ASU grad & SoCal native.
